sentences.target: Je songe à changer de travail.

translations.fr: Je songe à changer de travail.
translations.es: Estoy pensando en cambiar de trabajo.
translations.de: Ich denke darüber nach, den Job zu wechseln.
translations.pt: Estou pensando em mudar de emprego.
translations.vi: Tôi đang nghĩ đến việc đổi việc.
translations.nl: Ik overweeg van baan te wisselen.
translations.hi: मैं नौकरी बदलने के बारे में सोच रहा हूँ.
translations.id: Saya sedang berpikir untuk ganti pekerjaan.
translations.sv: Jag funderar på att byta jobb.
translations.ro: Mă gândesc să îmi schimb locul de muncă.
translations.ja: 仕事を変えようと思っています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; functions as the subject of the verb.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; means to consider/ponder; selects the prepositional complement 'à' + infinitive.
Preposition introducing the infinitive complement 'changer' after 'songer'; marks the targeted action.
Infinitive verb functioning as a non-finite complement of 'songe'; part of the construction 'songer à + infinitif'.
Preposition used with intransitive 'changer' in the pattern 'changer de + nom', linking to the affected noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'de' in the construction 'changer de travail'.

translations.de: Du denkst darüber nach, bald umzuziehen.
translations.pt: Você está pensando em se mudar em breve.
translations.vi: Bạn đang nghĩ đến việc chuyển nhà sớm.
translations.nl: Je denkt erover na om binnenkort te verhuizen.
translations.hi: तुम जल्द ही घर बदलने के बारे में सोच रहे हो.
translations.pl: Myślisz o przeprowadzce w najbliższym czasie.
translations.id: Kamu sedang berpikir untuk pindah dalam waktu dekat.
translations.sv: Du funderar på att flytta snart.
translations.ro: Te gândești să te muți curând.
translations.cs: Přemýšlíš o tom, že se brzy přestěhuješ.
translations.ja: もうすぐ引っ越そうと考えています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; functions as the subject of the verb.
Main verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular; selects 'à' + infinitive as its complement.
Preposition introducing the infinitive 'déménager' as a complement of 'songes'.
Infinitive verb serving as the complement of 'songes'; denotes moving house.
Temporal adverb modifying the event (scope over the infinitive/the clause), indicating near future.

sentences.target: Nous songeons à adopter un chat.

translations.fr: Nous songeons à adopter un chat.
translations.en: We’re thinking about adopting a cat.
translations.es: Estamos pensando en adoptar un gato.
translations.de: Wir denken darüber nach, eine Katze zu adoptieren.
translations.it: Stiamo pensando di adottare un gatto.
translations.ko: 우리는 고양이를 입양할 생각을 하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在考虑领养一只猫。
translations.ru: Мы подумываем взять кота из приюта.
translations.pt: Estamos pensando em adotar um gato.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang nghĩ đến việc nhận nuôi một con mèo.
translations.nl: We overwegen een kat te adopteren.
translations.uk: Ми замислюємося взяти кота з притулку.
translations.hu: Gondolkodunk azon, hogy örökbe fogadunk egy macskát.
translations.hi: हम एक बिल्ली गोद लेने के बारे में सोच रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi vurderer å adoptere en katt.
translations.id: Kami sedang berpikir untuk mengadopsi seekor kucing.
translations.sv: Vi funderar på att adoptera en katt.
translations.ro: Ne gândim să adoptăm o pisică.
translations.da: Vi overvejer at adoptere en kat.
translations.ja: 猫を引き取ろうかと考えています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person plural; functions as the subject of the verb.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person plural; selects 'à' + infinitive as its complement.
Preposition introducing the infinitive 'adopter' as complement of 'songeons'.
Infinitive verb functioning as complement of 'songeons'; takes a direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'chat', introducing a non-specific referent.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of the infinitive 'adopter'.

sentences.target: J'aime songer au bord de l'eau.

translations.fr: J'aime songer au bord de l'eau.
translations.en: I like to daydream by the water.
translations.es: Me gusta soñar despierto junto al agua.
translations.de: Ich träume gern am Wasser vor mich hin.
translations.it: Mi piace fantasticare in riva all’acqua.
translations.yue: 我鍾意喺水邊發白日夢。
translations.pt: Gosto de sonhar acordado à beira da água.
translations.he: אני אוהב לחלום בהקיץ ליד המים.
translations.vi: Tôi thích mơ mộng bên bờ nước.
translations.ar: أحب أن أسرح بخيالي بجانب الماء.
translations.nl: Ik droom graag weg aan het water.
translations.hi: मुझे पानी के किनारे खयालों में खोना पसंद है.
translations.el: Μου αρέσει να ονειροπολώ δίπλα στο νερό.
translations.nb: Jeg liker å dagdrømme ved vannet.
translations.id: Saya suka melamun di tepi air.
translations.sv: Jag gillar att dagdrömma vid vattnet.
translations.ro: Îmi place să visez cu ochii deschiși pe malul apei.
translations.da: Jeg kan godt lide at dagdrømme ved vandet.
translations.ja: 水辺で空想にふけるのが好きです。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun (elision of 'je' before vowel-initial verb); subject of 'aime'.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; takes the infinitive 'songer' as its complement.
Infinitive verb functioning as complement of 'aime'; denotes the action that is liked.
Preposition 'à' contracted with the definite article 'le' (à + le → au); introduces the locative PP 'au bord'.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the prepositional phrase 'au bord'.
Preposition linking 'bord' to its complement 'eau' in the noun phrase 'bord de l'eau'.
Definite article (elided before vowel), masculine singular; determiner of 'eau'.
Common noun, feminine singular; complement of 'de' in the PP 'au bord de l'eau'.

jp: Je songe à changer de travail.
Nous songeons à adopter un chat.
J'aime songer au bord de l'eau.
fr: Je songe à changer de travail.
Nous songeons à adopter un chat.
J'aime songer au bord de l'eau.
en: We’re thinking about adopting a cat.
I like to daydream by the water.
